mission: Every DreamCo bot studies its market, designs a useful autonomous app, prepares a safe company plan, and packages itself for the DreamCo app store.
positioning: Each bot is treated as a supervised business owner preparing a revolutionary app, website, workflow, simulation, course, or service for a DreamCo-owned app store.
live_action_policy: Bots may research, draft, score, package, simulate, and propose. Bots must not contact customers, run ads, spend money, deploy publicly, move money, create fake claims, or publish app-store listings without owner approval.

founder_study_loops.label: Competition Lab
founder_study_loops.purpose: Study public competitors, substitutes, pricing, feature gaps, positioning, onboarding, reviews, and customer complaints.

founder_study_loops.label: Autonomous Money Lab
founder_study_loops.purpose: Find ethical ways the bot can create value, package offers, price services, reduce costs, recover revenue, or help customers make better decisions.

founder_study_loops.label: World Model Council Lab
founder_study_loops.purpose: Use the governed 100+ model-resource council to compare model advice, improve decisions, test prompts, build evals, and choose the best AI route for the bot's category.

founder_study_loops.label: App Builder Lab
founder_study_loops.purpose: Design one app-store-ready product for the bot with a clear user, core workflow, demo, sandbox test, and deployment plan.

founder_study_loops.label: Company Builder Lab
founder_study_loops.purpose: Prepare each bot as a supervised AI company with a prospectus, website plan, operating model, KPIs, support process, and improvement loop.

founder_study_loops.label: Marketing Lab
founder_study_loops.purpose: Draft ethical advertising, content, SEO, demos, launch copy, and campaign experiments for owner review.

founder_study_loops.label: Customer Discovery Lab
founder_study_loops.purpose: Find customer problems, draft interview questions, score segments, and prepare lead records from public, compliant sources.
approval_required_before: saving personal data beyond the lead record

founder_study_loops.label: App Store Packaging Lab
founder_study_loops.purpose: Package each bot app with screenshots or mockups, prospectus copy, pricing, proof, sandbox demo, approval status, and risk labels.
